[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101010 4
1 0111110 5
2 0000101 2
3 1001111 5
4 0010111 4
5 1101010 4
6 0111110 5
7 0011101 4

01 0011000 2
12 0000010 1
23 0000101 2 match 2
34 1000000 1
45 0100010 2
56 0010100 2
67 0001001 2
70 1100010 3

71 1010000 2
